title: phyllanthus gageanus
intro: Phyllanthus gageanus, a plant species native to Myanmar and India, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been found to help in reducing fever, pain, and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Phyllanthus gageanus include its potential to protect against liver damage, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus gageanus can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed orally or used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
